tool.description: Infrastructure tool name (kubectl, terraform, helm, etc.)

operation.description: Tool operation (apply, delete, destroy, upgrade, etc.)

raw_artifact.description: Raw artifact content (YAML manifest, JSON plan, etc.)

canonical_action.description: Optional pre-canonicalized classification overrides. Fields like tool, operation, and resource_shape_hash are derived server-side and should not be provided here.

origin.description: How the actor connected (mcp-stdio, cli, etc.)

skill_version.description: Prompt/skill contract version used by the actor (for behavior slicing)

session_id.description: Run/session boundary identifier. If omitted, Evidra generates one per operation.

operation_id.description: Operation identifier, unique within a session

attempt.description: Retry attempt counter for this operation

parent_span_id.description: Parent span for hierarchical agent workflows

scope_dimensions.description: Detailed environment metadata (cluster, namespace, account, region). Not used in metrics.
